name: How important is website speed for voice search and local SEO?
description: Very important. Fast, mobile-friendly pages are easier for voice search systems to use and better for users trying to contact you quickly.

mainEntity.name: How important is website speed for voice search and local SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Speed matters because many voice searches happen on mobile devices, where slow pages create drop-off. A fast, mobile-friendly page gives search engines a better chance to use your content and gives users a better experience.
acceptedAnswer.description: Very important. Fast, mobile-friendly pages are easier for voice search systems to use and better for users trying to contact you quickly.
